admin_messages.bot_started: 🤖 Bot successfully started! All systems operational. Let's hack the matrix.
admin_messages.settings_updated: ✅ Settings have been updated successfully! Naya system load ho gaya.
admin_messages.welcome_test: 🧪 Welcome message test sent! Check kar lo sab theek hai ya nahi.
admin_messages.no_permission: ❌ Aap admin nahi hain! Chup-chap normal member ban ke raho. Command allowed nahi hai.
admin_messages.invalid_format: ⚠️ Invalid format! Sahi syntax use karein, thoda documentation padh liya karo.
admin_messages.stats_header: 📊 Bot Statistics: Ye raha tumhara pura hisaab-kitab.
admin_messages.health_header: 🩺 Bot Health Status: Ping, RAM, and Uptime details here.
admin_messages.error_logged: ⚠️ Ek error aayi hai. Error logs check karo console me.
admin_messages.db_connected: 🗄️ Database connection successful! Data secure hai.
admin_messages.db_error: ❌ Database connect nahi ho raha. Credentials check karo.
admin_messages.user_banned: 🔨 User ko hamesha ke liye ban kar diya gaya hai. Peace out!
admin_messages.user_muted: 🤐 User ko mute kar diya gaya hai. Ab shanti rahegi.
admin_messages.broadcast_started: 📢 Broadcast shuru ho gaya hai. Sabko message bheja ja raha hai...
admin_messages.broadcast_done: ✅ Broadcast complete ho gaya! Messages delivered successfully.
admin_messages.maintenance_mode: 🛠️ Bot ab maintenance mode me hai. Sirf admins command use kar sakte hain.
admin_messages.system_reboot: 🔄 Bot is rebooting... naye features load ho rahe hain.
admin_messages.command_not_found: ❓ Ye kaisa command tha? System ko samajh nahi aaya. Type /help.
admin_messages.user_warned: ⚠️ Warning de di gayi hai! Agli baar direct ban padega.
admin_messages.spam_detected: 🛡️ Spam detect hua hai. Safai chalu hai... kachra saaf.
admin_messages.vip_status_given: 👑 User ko VIP status de diya gaya hai. Royal entry activated!
